# Geotechnik — Schwerin

> Geotechnical engineering services in Schwerin, Deutschland.

- [Injektionen](https://schwerin.geotechnik.sbs/injektionen/)
- [Labor In Situ](https://schwerin.geotechnik.sbs/labor-in-situ/)

- [Starrer Belag](https://schwerin.geotechnik.sbs/starrer-belag/)

## About
This site provides geotechnical engineering services in Schwerin, Deutschland.
Compliant with local and international standards (ASTM, ISO, country-specific norms).
